raw_consumer_statement:
I noticed a charge of {$62.00} on my Citi card that I did not authorized and had already late fees. I called Citibank bank in XXXX when I noticed and Citi Bank gave me credit back and removed the late fees too. On XXXX XXXX, 2023 I got an alert from XXXX that my credit card with Citibank was already late and had late fees. I called CitiBank and asked about it but they said the merchant had proof that the purchase was legit. I request Citi Bank to send me the proof from the merchant. In the documents the merchant sent, they have a different email that the one Citibank has for my file, the merchant gave email XXXX, the purchase was done in XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/2023, I have my records from my job that I was at work on that date in PA, USA. 
I already explained to Citibank that it was not me and that I am also a victim of fraud and XXXX in monitory my credit because back in XX/XX/2023, XXXX, XXXX had a security incident that resulted in the unauthorized disclosure of my personal informantion
